summary: Partner Portal Pack testing completed - 36/36 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend pages render and function correctly. Fixed bug in partner_auth_routes.py where /me endpoint wasn't receiving Authorization header properly (changed parameter from plain `str` to `Header(None)`).

partner_auth.notes: Login with valid credentials returns access_token. Login with invalid credentials returns 401. /me endpoint fixed (was missing Header import) and returns current partner user with partner info.

partner_dashboard.notes: Returns partner info and summary stats (catalog_count, active_allocations, pending_fulfillment, completed_jobs, settlement_total_estimate). Requires authentication.

partner_catalog_crud.notes: Full CRUD operations working. Partners can only see their own items. Delete is soft-delete (sets is_active to false).

partner_stock_table.notes: Stock table returns simplified view of items. Bulk update allows updating qty, status, price, lead_time for multiple items at once.

partner_fulfillment_jobs.notes: CRITICAL VERIFIED: No customer PII exposed (customer_email, customer_name, customer_phone, customer_company, delivery_address, customer_id all stripped). Status filtering works. Status update supports allocated→accepted→in_progress→fulfilled workflow.

partner_settlements.notes: Returns total_due, total_paid, total_all_time and transaction rows. No customer PII in settlement data.

partner_bulk_upload.notes: Template provides JSON format guide. Validate checks for errors before import. Bulk upload supports insert/update based on SKU match.

country_launch_config.notes: Full CRUD for country launch configurations. Public endpoint returns waitlist_enabled and partner_recruitment_enabled status.

country_expansion_waitlist.notes: Allows users to join waitlist with email, name, company_name, etc. Validates required fields (country_code, email).

country_expansion_partner_application.notes: Submit partner application with company details. Check application status by email.

admin_country_partner_applications.notes: List/filter applications, review and update status (submitted→under_review→approved→rejected→onboarded), get stats summary.

public_country_catalog.notes: Public endpoints hide internal pricing (base_partner_price, partner_id). Country availability returns status and waitlist settings.

partner_login_page.notes: Login page renders with email/password inputs and Sign In button. Error message displays for invalid credentials. Successful login redirects to /partner dashboard.

partner_dashboard_page.notes: Dashboard shows partner name, summary stats (Catalog Items, Active Allocations, Pending Fulfillment, Settlement Estimate), Partner Information card, and Quick Actions.

partner_catalog_page.notes: Shows catalog items with Edit/Deactivate buttons. Add Item button opens modal with full form (Type, SKU, Name, Description, Category, Base Price, Konekt Qty, Status, Lead Time, Min Order Qty, Unit, Regions).

partner_fulfillment_page.notes: Shows fulfillment queue with filter buttons (All Jobs, Pending, Accepted, In Progress, Completed, Issues). Empty state displayed when no jobs.

partner_settlements_page.notes: Shows Pending Settlement, Total Paid, All-Time Earnings cards. Transaction History table. Settlement Information notice about payment terms.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: partner_auth_routes.py - /me endpoint was using `authorization: str = None` instead of `authorization: str = Header(None)`, causing 401 errors
SECURITY VERIFIED: Fulfillment jobs correctly strip all customer PII fields before returning to partners
SECURITY VERIFIED: Public country catalog hides base_partner_price and partner_id from public view
Partner auth uses separate JWT secret (PARTNER_JWT_SECRET) from main app for isolation
All partner portal endpoints properly validate partner ownership before returning/modifying data

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 5 partner portal pages load and function correctly)

seed_data_creation: Test partner 'Demo Supplier Co' exists with user account demo@supplier.com. Test catalog items created during testing with SKUs starting with TEST- and BULK-TEST-. Country Kenya (KE) configured for partner recruitment.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Portal Pack fully tested and working. Partner authentication uses separate JWT system (PARTNER_JWT_SECRET). All partner portal APIs properly isolate partner data - partners can only see their own catalog items, fulfillment jobs, and settlements. CRITICAL: Customer PII is correctly stripped from fulfillment jobs returned to partners. Country expansion features (waitlist, partner applications) working. Public country catalog hides internal pricing.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: /api/partner-auth/me endpoint returning 401 even with valid Authorization header
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The endpoint was using `authorization: str = None` as a plain function parameter instead of `authorization: str = Header(None)` which is required for FastAPI to extract the value from the HTTP header
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed parameter definition to use Header(None) and added Header import from fastapi
